page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web server for the genome wide prediction of protein coding genes from eukaryotic DNA sequences based on pre-computed models of gene structures. Users may also compute their own model using their own data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web server for the genome wide prediction of protein coding genes from eukaryotic DNA sequences based on pre-computed models of gene structures. Users may also compute their own model using their own data.
